center.name: 托雷斯海峡
center.summary: 托雷斯海峡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括斑肩姬地鸠、Collared imperial pigeon、Buff-breasted paradise kingfisher等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: During the breeding season from November to March, the buff-breasted paradise kingfisher is found in coastal north-east Queensland from islands in the Torres Strait and Cape York Peninsula south to Byfield, in central Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It may visit the northern Torres Strait islands as a vagrant. It inhabits lowland rainforest, swamp forest, mangroves and riverine vegetation

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The flycatcher is found in northern Australia, from the Kimberley region of Western Australia, across the Top End of the Northern Territory, to the Gulf Country and south-western Cape York Peninsula of north-west Queensland, with a population on Saibai Island in Torres Strait

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They have also been observed in the Torres Strait and are also found in other countries of the South Pacific region, such as Papua New Guinea
